summary: Iteration 111: Validated Whisper STT migration to emergentintegrations and FRAME_TYPES redesign as storybook pages. Backend: 20/20 tests passed (100%). All code structure verifications passed. Whisper now uses emergentintegrations.llm.openai.OpenAISpeechToText with EMERGENT_LLM_KEY. FRAME_TYPES has 6 entries (Pagina 1-6) with narrative action prompts (OPENING MOMENT, RISING ACTION, KEY ACTION, REACTION, CONSEQUENCE, CLOSING MOMENT). Frontend has NO Maximize2 import, NO expandedPanel state, NO isExpanded variable. Toolbar shows 'Pag X/Y' format and filmstrip shows page numbers.
critical_code_review_comments: storyboard.py line 20-51: FRAME_TYPES has 6 entries with labels 'Pagina 1' through 'Pagina 6' and 'order' field 1-6
storyboard.py FRAME_TYPES prompts contain narrative/storybook language: OPENING MOMENT, RISING ACTION, KEY ACTION, REACTION, CONSEQUENCE, CLOSING MOMENT
storyboard.py FRAME_TYPES does NOT contain camera angle terminology (Plano Geral, Close-up, etc. removed)
storyboard.py line 113: _generate_single_frame prompt says 'standalone page in a children's storybook'
llm.py line 109: speech_to_text imports OpenAISpeechToText from emergentintegrations.llm.openai
llm.py line 111: speech_to_text uses EMERGENT_LLM_KEY (not OPENAI_API_KEY)
ai.py line 10: imports speech_to_text as stt_direct from core.llm
StoryboardEditor.jsx: NO Maximize2 import from lucide-react
StoryboardEditor.jsx line 456-457: Filmstrip thumbnails show page numbers {fi + 1} in bottom-right corner
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 111 verified: 1) Whisper STT migrated to emergentintegrations (uses OpenAISpeechToText with EMERGENT_LLM_KEY), 2) FRAME_TYPES redesigned as storybook pages (Pagina 1-6 with narrative action prompts), 3) Zoom/expand button removed from UI (no Maximize2, expandedPanel, isExpanded), 4) Toolbar shows 'Pag X/Y' format, 5) Filmstrip shows page numbers. The /api/ai/transcribe endpoint works with emergentintegrations. Studio is accessed via Marketing > AI Studio > Estudio option.

frame_types_structure.has_narrative_prompts: PASS - OPENING MOMENT, RISING ACTION, KEY ACTION, REACTION, CONSEQUENCE, CLOSING MOMENT
frame_types_structure.no_camera_angles: PASS - Plano Geral, Close-up, etc. removed
